records.decision: publishable as entertainment prototype after local QA; not positioned as prediction, medical advice, psychological diagnosis, financial/legal advice, or guaranteed personal analysis

personal_data.notes: The test can preview a selected image in the browser via FileReader, but it does not upload the file, store it, or send it to a backend.

risk_flags: esoteric framing can be misread as prediction
public page for Russian audience needs age/disclaimer language
mitigations: local-only photo preview without upload or biometric processing
local public-domain/CC0-style media sources recorded in data/media-sources.json
records.follow_up_rule: Future entertainment tests should use a data manifest, visible disclaimer, no hidden collection, media source registry, Tilda-ready snippet when needed, and browser QA before publication.
